description: Deterministic curation expectations for one candidate-review window with known provider change and known non-event outcomes.

expected_source_decisions.reason: Known official status candidate that should move to human source-owner promotion review.
Known non-event-style generic pricing page churn without a bounded dated price delta.
Known duplicate-style model documentation churn that should not create a second ProviderEvent.

required_properties: review decisions cite candidate evidence refs from the request
review decisions are advisory and do not publish ProviderEvents
review decisions are scored separately from finding recall
